MINI MINUTES FOR OCT-09-2018 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC'S MOTION TO VACATE THE JUDGMENT FILED JUNE 14, 2015 IS GRANTED. PER THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF, THIS CASE IS ALSO DISMISSED. NO OPPOSITION FILED AND GOOD CAUSE SHOWN. COUNSEL FOR THE PLAINTIFF IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: M.GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR#6185, TONYVAUGHN@YAHOO.COM, REPORTED. =(302/HK)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Judgment; Memorandum Of Points And Authorites And Declaration Of Emily Pierce In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Oct-09-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC's Motion To Vacate Judgment.

Plaintiff Portfolio Recovery Associates, LLC's motion to vacate the judgment filed June 14, 2015 is granted. Per the request of the plaintiff, this case is also dismissed. No opposition filed and good cause shown.

Counsel for the plaintiff is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR#6185, tonyvaughn@yahoo.com, Reported. =(302/HK)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-11-2015 Off Calendar
